data.description:
Supersedes bug e983 (config_manual fire-and-forget) by generalizing it into an infra-health readiness gate for the review/landing pipeline.

PRINCIPLE: an unhealthy infra precondition (unapplied/invalid config, LLM-provider outage, GitHub outage, env error) makes LLM Review UNSOUND. Treat these as INFRA-CLASS conditions (per Zuul RETRY_LIMIT/NODE_FAILURE): block fail-closed, do NOT cast a content vote, and AUTO-RECOVER (re-run blocked reviews) when the signal returns healthy — no human recheck (author changed nothing; only the environment did).

DESIGN (OSS-grounded):
- Health registry: named checks, each tri-state healthy/unhealthy/unknown (never conflate 'check errored' with 'healthy'). Signals: config-applied (live-vs-desired refs-meta/replication probe), config-valid, llm-provider (Anthropic reachable/quota), github (API/Actions/mirror), deploy-host/replication, environment.
- Aggregator: per-signal blocking vs advisory severity; fail-closed on any blocking-unhealthy. (cf. Argo health assessment; K8s readiness gate.)
- Consumption points, one health source: (a) REVIEW boundary — review-bot ABSTAINS (casts no LLM-Review content vote) when infra unhealthy, instead of erroring/false-voting; (b) LANDING boundary — dedicated bot-cast Infra-Ready submit-requirement blocks submit with an explicit per-signal message. Keeps env-readiness OFF the code-content labels (avoids the 'environment masquerading as a review vote' anti-pattern).
- Recovery = infra-class retry loop: on signal recovery, auto-re-run blocked reviews + re-eval gate; bounded (RETRY_LIMIT), windowed (thundering-herd), same-patchset re-vote that cleanly REPLACES the stale -1, terminal alert on exhaustion. (cf. Zuul infra-class auto-retry.)
- Reliability: independent tri-state observation (Ansible/Puppet lesson: apply exit-0 != converged; only a zero-diff re-read proves it); Terraform-style tri-state so a probe ERROR never false-clears; marker bound to the config revision it was computed against (Terraform stale-plan rejection).
- Waiver + break-glass: audited per-signal/global override; guard-the-guard on who may waive (Gatekeeper); a guaranteed break-glass reachable when the gate itself is wedged.
- Rollout: WARN/detect-only first (emit signals, do not block) until detection proven reliable, THEN flip to fail-closed. Staged config-first.

CONTEXT: closes the e983 root cause properly (durable reconciled status, not a fire-and-forget event) and also turns today's ad-hoc LLM/GitHub-outage failures into one loud, self-healing, auditable signal. Related: 0e15 (--class propagation), and the plan-review calibration miss on epic 86ac/ed13 that let consumer-migration advisories ship sub-threshold.
data.title: Infra-Ready health gate: fail-closed review/landing gate over infra-health signals with infra-class auto-recovery
